briefs.title: BC Business Corporations Regulation amended to recognise Indigenous nations as corporate owners
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 3/2026 amends the Business Corporations Regulation to add 'Indigenous nation' as a recognised intermediary and ownership category, and defines 'professional limited liability partnership' for regulatory purposes.
briefs.action_required: Review your corporate ownership or intermediary structures if Indigenous nations or professional LLPs are involved, and update records accordingly.
briefs.industries: Professional Services, Finance & Insurance, Natural Resources
